patch: Thirty million similar yet different stories... Doesn't it sound like a lot? But I never grew tired of it. I even relived it when I travelled with you, and it was still so moving! However, there were always regrets left on every single page. I wanted to add some smiles here and fill up some blanks there... It was all thanks to you that we could finally compose a romantic ending for them ♪
I really look forward to seeing how your "story" will unfold in future journeys. I hope Amphoreus's "memories" will become a romantic note in those journeys... It definitely will, right? ♪
You always talk about Dan Heng. After all, having such a reliable companion to support the road ahead must be why the Trailblaze can dash forward so courageously.
The Imperator's crown really grabs your attention. Maybe... the next time we're in Aedes Elysiae, you can also make a wreath of wheat for me ♪

Do you like swings? Whenever I swing with the wind, my heart soars super high as well. It feels like I could catch up to everything I've longed for. Come on, let's go on the swings together. You can hold my hand if you're scared~
... Saying all that, I can finally fade away in peace... and become a part of you.
Your surprised expression is just like what the memories recorded.
It's me, friend. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?
It's me, friend. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?
I can't remember what happened in those thirty million cycles, but I remember what you did for this world.
Hey. Everything about you is good, friend. That's why I'll remember all of it.
Thankfully, you arrived during his long wait, friend.
Hmm... Which means it's probably time to borrow that treasure you're carrying, friend.
I'm prepared to witness that miracle, friend.
Maybe it's because of Mem? After all, Mem's a memosprite born out of your thoughts, friend. Maybe our memories somehow got tangled up together?
Friend... You're too curious.
Friend, are you ready to become a hero?
But I believe in you, friend. The Trailblaze's duty has always been a heavy one.
Why don't we take everyone with us? I believe in you, friend. We'll never be alone, no matter what awaits us.
And we may also share a common future? A future that has never emerged in any other cycles before? I believe in you, friend.
Are you worried that the burden is too heavy for you? Don't worry. Maybe the answer isn't as complicated as you think.
In other words, since you've already saved so many worlds, friend, you should be used to being called a hero by now.
...Friend? Are you listening?
Friend... Friend?
Why don't we find a place to hide and observe from the shadows?
...We might as well dance their dance. Let's go with them to the holy city.
Calm and confident. That's the you I'm familiar with.
So I'm the key? Since you insist, friend... I'll give it my all!
Calm and confident. That's the you I'm familiar with.
I'm Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer. Nice to meet you both.
I'm Cyrene of Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer beyond the sky. We're new here and wanted to ask you...
Exactly. Just as the prophecy foretold, she is your Deliverer from beyond the sky. And she also has reliable allies.
And she's clearly hiding something. What do you think?
...Wait! Don't go in yet...
It's even more accurate than a prophecy. After all, she has already witnessed it, right?
Look, the venue's right ahead.
It seems like he's aiming specifically for the Chronocognitive Anchor. What should we do?

After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...
Hmm, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after."

After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...
But listen, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after"?

After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...
I knew it. You and I can practically read each other's minds~
Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust my friend anywhere, anytime.
But she'll probably get really disappointed if we tell her that... What should we do?
Teehee, and that's the art of conversation! I learned it from you, after all. So, how did I do?
Doesn't this count as bringing in outside food? I knew that security check was targeted at us.
My friend has in fact come here to stop that villain's evil scheme. Our goals are aligned.
But as to the decision the Imperator must make... she has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.
S—Slow down!
What are you doing?
That's right, friend...
No, friend...
Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust my friend anywhere, anytime.
But as to the decision the Imperator must make... she has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.
Careful...
Welcome back, friend.
You must be really confused right now, aren't you? So much has happened in Amphoreus while you were gone.
Come... This way.
And I'll share the moments I spent with you with everyone. That way, the path we walked becomes a memory shared by all.
I wonder what kind of expression you're wearing right now? Probably the same as always: calm, resolute, and brimming with confidence.
Someone as sharp as you must've realized by now that this isn't reality, but a maze of Time.
And then... may it set sail in peace... Drift down the river of time along with the Coreflame of Worldbearing, reach your side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.
This is the only way to make sure that the "Era Nova" won't happen before you return...
I believe you will never let us down... just like always.
Do you remember when Phainon sent us back to the beginning? When you and I got separated? But in the end, I returned to you, carrying all that we've been through.
So don't worry. Let the 33,550,337th Flame-Chase Journey become part of you, too. I've gotten a lot better at it with the experience from the last time.
After all, it took 33 million cycles for her to arrive in our world... What's a few moments more?
Next, you will head to Styxia and find the Vortex's entrance guarded by the demigod of Ocean, before charging toward the final battlefield.
You've already mentioned my friend and I, so it's an easy connection to make, no? My intuition has always been very on-point.
As long as my friend and I are together, we can do anything.
Long time no see, friend. Did you miss me while you were away?
Same here. I've been waiting for you for a thousand years...
I see. After all, your burden sure is heavy, my friend. You're carrying the weight of the entire world...
But that's not who I am. I'm just an average girl with some secrets. So... I've been waiting for you for a thousand years.
You probably already knew about the geniuses' plans from that "memory." I had to hide really well in a corner in Time so Lygus wouldn't find me, and wait for the right opportunity.
Not a problem! You can just relax. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...
You're always so serious, and that's why you always feel so reassuring. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...
Remember the joke we made back at the Grove?
What about you? What did you feel when we touched each other?
Are you nervous? Me too, actually. You and I weren't so reserved around each other when I was still Mem.
Hahaha, you're way too honest! But that innocence is what makes you so uniquely charming.
Give me your blessings, friend. Then...
I'm gonna keep doing what I just did if you don't stop, you know? My friend and I won't allow you to leave this "memory" no matter what happens...
This is the first step of my friend's journey among the starry seas. This place is called the Herta Space Station. Ummm... Just think of it as a supersized Grove of Epiphany.
Look, over there. Looks like she is talking to Madam Herta in this memory.
Speaking of the Order... Another one of my friend's companions may be able to enlighten you further on that.
It's also my friend's previous stop, where they went through a risky but exciting adventure.
"Friend, what's going on? Your consciousness... suddenly went so far away."
My friend, Dan Heng, and March 7th will all merge with the Scepter and become a victim of the Destruction.
Though the surging memoria tide swept my friend away... I must return to her side before Miss "Evernight" succeeds.
Another one of these stealth missions, huh? Help me out here, friend's inner world...
Could it be... my friend! Maybe it's the "Stellaron" she mentioned.
Let's go there to find my friend.
Thankfully, her presence hasn't weakened. I feel like I'm getting a bit closer...
Is that my friend's photostone? What's it doing here?
Welcome to the trail of "Genesis," friend.
But if I keep growing, I might be taller than you, right? Then I'm really looking forward to that.
Are you ready to answer the call of the world, friend?
The moment when our friend bore the weight of thirty million cycles of "memories"...
"Friend, are you ready to become a hero?"
Thank you, friend. I was also trying to cheer myself up with what I said.
My apologies, friend. The more memories I got back along the way, the more I felt that something wasn't right.
Look, friend. The words on that wall are the answer.
Thank you, friend. "Every single Cyrene"... That sounds so kind.
That's pretty forward of you, you know? Still... thank you, friend. That's very reassuring.
This is the final puzzle piece of the "memories"
I turned into a little fairy from the stories and met you, yet I forgot everything.
I want you to call me "Cyrene."
Thank you, friend. Your kindness is always just right.
And what happens after that... I don't know either.
Remember this moment, friend.
That's why we're here, right, friend?
My friend's eyes really lit up...
This challenge is practically made for you, isn't it?
Scrolls filled with horrifying content... Friend, shall we take a look?
Relax now. Take a deep breath.
As promised, take it now.
Make sure you watch your footing, friend.
▀▄Hold onto▄█Me▄▀▄
"Friend... You're... finally awake."
"But I'm still here, and you're still here, no?"
"Friend... You're already right next to me."
"But... You're already right next to me, friend."
"I knew you'd find this place."
Friend's shoulders are really dependable.
Can you still move? It's time... for us to complete the real "genesis."
Don't be afraid. Take my hand if you feel nervous.
Then, take a deep breath one last time, friend.
Are you ready, friend?
Come on, friend... The cosmos is waiting for us to flip to the next page.
We promised each other to keep moving forward together, friend.
We finally meet.
After such a good sleep, you must be bursting with energy now, right, friend?
But Amphoreus already has a "tomorrow." So, as long as you carefully preserve and tend to all the seeds, then when the Trailblaze creates another miracle someday in the future...
Promise me one last thing, friend...
March, Dan Heng, my friend...
We're its co-authors after all, friend.
Can you forgive me, friend? I made a decision on my own while you were away...
All I wanted to say was, "Don't give up. She will find you"... "Memory" truly is amazing.
The first time... was also the last time I saw you, friend ♪
I no longer have the strength... to make The Hero Within look like her.
Cyrene. And you...
"The stars across the cosmos will know: I am the fairy who wrote As I've Written together with you."
"And in your heart, I know I will always be given the name I love most, the one you gave me."
Please keep helping them and the others in the future, too, Miss Black Swan.
The spear of Strife nearly claimed her life...
Ah, it's good to see you! Come take a look. Want to see the treasure of Aedes Elysiae?
That's right, you get it too, don't you? Sometimes, you just feel so radiant you can't help but stop in front of a mirror...
Can I ask? Do you like being by yourself? I do. Just staring at the lake by myself, gently swaying on the swing... My mind drifts far away, and by the time it comes back, I've already fallen asleep.
How wonderful! You're so patient. Stories only shine when they have a listener like you.
Thanks, I knew it! You're the best!
My, what a cheerful scene! Already getting along so well with the fairies? No surprise, you shine no matter where you go.
She seems excited and wants to play the "New Friend Game" with everyone. Hehe, let's humor her.
So formal! Perhaps... you might just have some leadership potential?
I was only joking! I just wanted to see your reaction. And sure enough, you never let me down.
